channel.title: Frameworks on Home Smart Mesh
channel.description: Recent content in Frameworks on Home Smart Mesh

item.title: raspi IoT
item.description: Raspi Github Repo Software # Raspbian OS Main services Mosquitto : https://mosquitto.org/ influxDB : https://www.influxdata.com/products/influxdb-overview/ mqtt2influx : py/influx Grafana : https://grafana.com/ graphql sensors : js/graphql x to mqtt Zigbee2mqtt : https://www.zigbee2mqtt.io/ nrf2mqtt : github nRF52_Mesh nrf_mesh miflora2mqtt : https://github.com/RaymondMouthaan/miflora-mqtt-daemon telegram bots2mqtt : js/telegraf based on https://github.com/telegraf/telegraf automation services Light control : py/hue Phantom Load cut : js/pc_control Heat cut : py/heating Home status : py/home_status Roborock button : py/hover user interface 3D webapp : https://github.

item.title: Thread SensorTag
item.description: Repo # schematics 07/02/2021 commit fe9999 Components Consumption # Full screen Open in a new page var button = document.getElementById("btn-72f656aff13f2aff"); button.onclick = ()={ var elem = document.getElementById("ifm-72f656aff13f2aff"); if (elem.requestFullscreen) { elem.requestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.webkitRequestFullscreen) { elem.webkitRequestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.msRequestFullscreen) { elem.msRequestFullscreen(); } }; Schematics # Full Screen function setup_svg_panzoom(){ let params = { panEnabled: true, zoomEnabled: true, dblClickZoomEnabled: true, controlIconsEnabled: false, mouseWheelZoomEnabled: true, preventMouseEventsDefault: true, zoomScaleSensitivity: 0.
